title: Jihlava, Vysočina — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Jihlava, Vysočina: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Jihlava is a city in Vysočina with a population of 52,000. The historic capital of the Vysočina region, known for its silver mining heritage, medieval catacombs, and the annual Festival of Military Music.

Last updated: July 12, 2026
